response.justification: Candidate has well over a decade of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP tooling, which directly matches a required skill. Demonstrated breadth across backend, frontend, DevOps, and embedded work, plus a track record of TDD, CI/CD, and teaching/workshops suggests strong engineering rigor. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java depth in recent roles, and explicit cloud-platform/Kubernetes production experience beyond AWS CDK and self-hosted setups, but the foundation is solid enough to warrant an interview.
strengths: Direct experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
13+ years of full-stack delivery across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong testing and engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, teaches workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Limited recent hands-on Kotlin/Java; Java mentions are from 8+ years ago
Cloud/Kubernetes experience present but light on depth with AWS/GCP/Azure managed services

key_factors.factor: Depth of engineering practice (TDD, CI/CD, architecture, teaching)
Missing Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java experience
